resources.string: Automatically download attachments for incoming emails
Only download attachments when manually requested
Know what to do\nwhen money lands
Build a clear payday plan in under two minutes, then run it manually or let Premium guide future adjustments.
See what to move to bills, goals, and everyday spending.
Turn payday money into a weekly amount you can trust.
Start without connecting accounts. Premium is offered only after your plan is ready.
This goal shapes the plan we build from your numbers.
Premium can split each payday across every goal later. Start with one clear outcome now.
This is the target your first payday plan will protect.
Tell My Share what arrives each payday
This becomes your weekly spend guide, goal path, and reminder schedule.
Reserve bills first, then shape the rest of your payday plan.
You have %1$s after essentials. Choose the split for today’s plan.
Your manual plan is ready. Premium is the version that reviews reality and guides the next payday.
Estimated date to reach your \"%1$s\" target.
Use the manual plan free. Continue only if you want the adaptive version for future paydays.
Premium can compare each review with your %1$s weekly guide and show whether to move more or less than %2$s toward %3$s next payday.
Premium can compare each review with your %1$s weekly guide and show what to tighten or relax before the next payday.
If your review shows %1$s unused, Premium can suggest moving it to %2$s while keeping your %3$s weekly guide safe.
If your review shows %1$s unused, Premium can show what to tighten or relax while keeping your %2$s weekly guide safe.
Keep today’s split until you change it.
Review once, get the next adjustment.
Bank sync is coming later. Your payday plan works now with manual check-ins, reminders, and clear rules.
Consistent check-ins are the key to building wealth. We\'ll send a gentle nudge to help you follow your plan.
Stay aligned with your plan at every income event.
Reflect and adjust your progress every Sunday.
Are you sure you want to remove this financial milestone? This action cannot be undone.
Tie each payday contribution to a clear outcome.
Adjust the name or target while keeping progress intact.
This goal is no longer available. Return to Strategy and choose another goal.
Are you sure you want to remove this payday rule? Your calculations will be updated immediately.
Applied after fixed costs, using the income left to allocate.
This rule is no longer available. Return to Strategy and choose another rule.
Personalizing your logic and safety nets based on your journey.
When money arrives on %1$s, these are the moves to make.
Protect %1$s for bills, move %2$s toward %3$s, then spend from the weekly guide.
Protect %1$s for bills, then spend from the weekly guide.
On payday, do this in order
Keep this transfer separate before spending.
Keep this transfer separate before spending.
No extra priority move is needed for this plan.
This is your flexible cap for the payday period.
At this pace, %1$s is on track around %2$s %3$s.
We will remind you on %1$s so the plan does not stay in your head.
Free saves this as a static split. Premium can review what happened and suggest the next adjustment before another payday.
Get the next payday change to consider after each review.
Keep check-ins tied to the plan you just built.
Split each payday across every target that matters.
Upgrade to unlock unlimited goals, automated payday rules, and deeper review insights.
Premium can split each priority move across more than one milestone, so one payday can protect your current goal and the next one.
Premium lets multiple rules work together for savings, investing, debt, and buffers after each review.
Premium keeps your full performance timeline visible so you can spot spending patterns over time.
Premium compares reviews with your weekly guide and shows what to change before the next payday.
Sign in to keep your financial plan synced safely.
No Google account is available on this device. Add an account or continue locally.
Google sign-in could not finish. Check your connection, add a Google account, or continue locally.
Keep your plan attached to your Google account.
Use the app now and sync later.
Google sync is optional. Local mode keeps this plan on your device until you choose to connect an account.
Target amount must be greater than zero.
This payday amount will drive every split, reminder, and future adjustment.
Use take-home pay after tax. No bank login is needed here.
Use day 1-28 so reminders still work in short months.
Enter the next payday date so the cycle can repeat every two weeks.
Enter your net income per payday.
Income must be greater than zero.
Use a payday day from 1 to 28.
Enter monthly fixed costs. Use 0 if none.
Fixed costs exceed your payday income. Lower fixed costs or increase income.
Rent, bills, subscriptions, and commitments are reserved before goals or flexible spending.
My Share will reserve this before shaping the rest of your payday plan.
Recurring rules and payday reminders can protect essentials automatically after setup.
Keep extra cushion around bills before funding goals.
A realistic split for most paydays.
Push more of the remaining money toward goals.
Tell the rest where to go
Keep a savings goal while leaving room for life.
Use the plan without forcing a savings bucket.
Prioritize repayments before savings or investing.
Route more of each payday toward long-term assets.
Track safe-to-spend money without goal contributions.
Start from a blank split and shape the rules yourself.
There is no income left to allocate. Go back and lower fixed costs or increase income.
Reduce one or more allocations until remaining reaches zero.
Your split turns this into today’s payday rules.
Start static, let Premium refine it
Free keeps this split manual. Premium can compare reviews and recommend exact changes before the next payday.
Money reserved for the goal you chose.
Extra debt payments beyond fixed minimums.
No target date is needed for this strategy.
How much of each payday goes toward future you.
This strategy keeps the remaining payday money flexible.
We saved your interest on this device and will use app updates to announce bank sync when it is ready.
Notification permission is required for reminders.
A short nudge helps you execute the plan before spending starts. You can change it later in More.
After a review, Premium can suggest whether the %1$s priority move should change while protecting your %2$s weekly guide.
Review once, see the next change.
Start with one milestone and one payday rule. You can refine both as your money rhythm becomes clearer.
Define what you are saving for.
Your next %1$s priority move can move %2$d goals forward.
You have %1$d active goals. We show %2$d here so the page stays easy to scan.
Open the full goal list anytime to review or update them.
All %1$d goals stay in one place so you can compare progress and make changes.
Split the next payday across goals
Premium can split your %1$s priority move between %2$s and another goal without rewriting the plan.
Your saved goals stay safe. Premium unlocks the full stack and splits payday moves across them.
Your next %1$s priority move follows %2$d saved rules.
You have %1$d active rules. We show %2$d here so the plan stays easy to scan.
Open the full rule list anytime to review or update your payday setup.
All %1$d rules stay in one place so you can review how each payday is split.
Turn one rule into a payday system
Premium can coordinate your %1$s rule with investing, debt, and buffer moves after each review.
Multiple rules that learn from reviews
Your saved rules stay safe. Premium unlocks every rule and keeps them coordinated after reviews.
Total flexible spend saved across reviews.
Premium turns every saved check-in into a trust score, streak, savings signal, and next payday pattern.
Your latest review stayed on plan. Premium can watch repeat surpluses and suggest when to move extra beyond the %1$s guide.
Your latest review missed the guide. Premium can show how to protect the next %1$s flexible guide and restore the %2$s goal move.
Review saved; adjust the plan yourself.
This payday is ready to review
Enter what actually happened below. Premium will compare it with the active guide before suggesting the next change.
%1$s was the planned check-in. Save the review now so Premium keeps the next adjustment honest.
Premium will check this plan again on %1$s. Keep the reminder on so the habit does not depend on memory.
This payday has a saved review. Premium will watch the plan again on %1$s.
Your reviews show you can keep spending near %1$s and move %2$s more to goals. Apply to set the next priority move to %3$s.
Premium would make this easier to hit
Your reviews show pressure on the %1$s flexible guide. Apply to free %2$s for real spending and set the next priority move to %3$s.
Your recent review stayed close to the guide. Keep %1$s for flexible spending and %2$s for priority moves.
Premium would turn your reviews into a one-tap rule update: %1$s flexible guide and %2$s priority move.
Premium would keep watching this pattern and protect your current %1$s flexible guide and %2$s priority move.
My Share will update the payday rules behind your next guide. You can review or undo the change right after.
Your next payday rules now match this recommendation. Review the rules if you want to fine-tune any transfer.
Most reviewed paydays stayed on plan. Keep using each review to protect what is already working.
Your plan is finding its rhythm
Your recent check-ins show progress with a few paydays to adjust. Premium keeps the next target realistic.
Your next target needs breathing room
Recent check-ins show pressure. Use this pattern to soften the next payday before the plan feels hard to follow.
Enter exact actuals so your next guide stays honest.
Complete your first review to build a timeline.
Premium compares hidden history with your latest review and turns trends into a next-payday adjustment.
1 older review in your Premium timeline
%1$d older reviews in your Premium timeline
Open all %1$d reviews grouped by month without crowding the current check-in.
All %1$d reviews grouped by month so long history stays readable.
Correct the actual amounts. Your history, progress, and recommendations update immediately.
Remove the %1$s review and reverse its goal contribution. This cannot be undone.
Your settings keep the manual plan usable. Premium can take over the adjustment work when you are ready.
Premium is active. Keep reminders, preferences, and subscription controls here.
Ready to review: Premium found a next guide of %1$s and a priority move of %2$s. You approve before rules change.
No rule change needed. Premium is protecting the current %1$s flexible guide and %2$s priority move.
Log a payday review and Premium will turn it into a clear rule recommendation before the next payday.
Finish a plan first so Premium has a payday routine to monitor.
Save today’s review so Premium can turn real results into the next recommendation.
%1$s is still waiting for a review. Add it to keep the Premium loop current.
Premium is scheduled to compare this plan again on %1$s.
The latest payday is covered. Premium will watch again on %1$s.
Premium can compare reviews with your %1$s weekly guide, protect the %2$s priority move, and coordinate your saved rules (%3$d) before payday.
Premium can compare reviews with your plan and coordinate saved rules (%1$d) before payday.
Ready to automate your payday rules
Premium turns reviews into the next rule adjustment.
Premium compares reviews with your weekly guide, then shows which rule or priority move should change before the next payday.
You are using local mode. Connect Google to sync this plan.
Back up and sync this plan with Google.
Google account connected. This plan can now sync safely.
No Google account is available on this device. Add one in Android settings and try again.
Google account connection could not finish. Check your connection and try again.
Open Google Play to view billing or cancel.
Start setup again on this device
Sign out could not finish. Check your connection and try again.
This signs you out and starts setup again on this device. The local plan on this device will be cleared.
See drift early and adjust before it becomes a habit.
%1$d-day free trial, then automatically renews at %2$s / %3$s unless canceled in Google Play before the trial ends.
Automatically renews at %1$s / %2$s. Cancel anytime in Google Play.
Secure checkout opens in Google Play. Pricing and trial eligibility appear there.
Your plan uses %1$s. Google Play charges in %2$s based on your Play Store region.
Premium starts with your %1$s weekly guide and %2$s priority move, then recommends the next adjustment after each review.
Premium starts with your %1$s weekly guide, then recommends the next adjustment after each review.
Premium starts with the plan you built, then recommends the next adjustment after each review.
If your review shows %1$s unused, Premium can suggest moving it to %2$s while protecting your %3$s weekly guide.
Premium watches your %1$s weekly guide after each review and shows what to tighten or relax before next payday.
After each review, Premium shows what to adjust before next payday.
Price, trial eligibility, renewal, and cancellation are handled by Google Play.
No bank connection is required to use your payday plan.
Manage or cancel from Google Play. Access stays active until the paid period ends.
Preparing the secure Play purchase screen…
Play purchase screen opened. Finish there to activate Premium.
Premium products are not available yet. Check Play Store setup or try again later.
Google Play could not open checkout. No charge was started. Try again or update Play Store.
Purchase canceled. No charge was made.
Google Play is still processing this purchase. Premium unlocks after approval.
Purchase received. Premium is being activated.
No Premium purchase was found for this Play account.
You can keep using My Share while this is resolved.
Connect Google so your plan and Premium access are easier to recover if this device is reset.
Monthly keeps the first step lighter while Premium uses each review to guide the next one.
Make every salary review guide the next one
Monthly is highlighted first so you can test the adaptive plan before committing.
Know what to adjust every payday
Start with this plan. After each review, Premium shows the next change to consider.
You\'re successfully building your cushion. Even if flexible spending varied, your core safety is intact.
Your savings contribution dipped. Try to protect those first to maintain your peace of mind.
Market exposure is holding steady. This consistency is exactly what builds long-term wealth.
Discipline slipped this cycle. Remember, small gaps today have a large impact on your future compounding.
You stayed within your flexible budget! This is a major win for your new financial habits.
Flexible spending ran %1$s over plan. Scan your transactions to see where the leak happened.
You maintained perfect alignment with the shared blueprint. Progress is visible and stable.
There\'s a drift between the plan and reality. A quick check-in can help get the logic back on track.
You\'ve hit your goal target 3 times in a row. Your discipline is building real wealth. Keep this momentum!
You consistently spend less than your flexible budget. Consider moving some of this extra \'buffer\' to your goals.
Your flexible spending has increased for 3 consecutive periods. A quick check-in on non-essentials might be helpful.
Great start with your first review! The more you log, the smarter your habit loop becomes.
Secure %1$s for bills and set aside %3$s. You have %2$s for safe spending.
Add more goal contribution to see a target date
Goal reached. Start your next vision!
Choose when My Share should remind you to review your plan.
Create a plan before saving a review.
Enter valid amounts for both review fields.
Applied. Your payday rules now use the Premium recommendation.
Undone. Your payday rules are back to the previous setup.
Products not loaded yet. Please check your internet connection.
Reminds you what to do with your next payday plan.
A safety net for life’s surprises.
Making your capital work for you.
Saving for a specific milestone or asset.
Build a salary plan first to unlock the repeat loop.
Authentication failed. Check your connection and try again.
Local sign-in failed. Try again in a moment.
Please complete or skip the bank sync step.
Cannot complete onboarding without a valid plan.
Use YYYY-MM-DD for the next biweekly payday.
This goal is no longer available.
Please enter a valid name and amount.
Premium is required to add another goal. Your saved goals stay safe, and extra goals unlock again when Premium is active.
This rule is no longer available.
Please enter a valid name and amount.
This rule exceeds the income available after fixed costs. Lower the amount or adjust another rule.
Premium is required to add another payday rule. Your saved rules stay safe, and extra rules unlock again when Premium is active.
A calm split that protects essentials and builds savings.
A disciplined split that keeps investing consistent each payday.
A tighter plan that protects future money before flexible spending.
A shared-friendly split that keeps bills clear and progress visible.
A practical split that does not force savings before you are ready.
A repayment-first split that puts extra pressure on debt.
An investing-led split that keeps long-term assets moving.
A flexible plan focused on safe-to-spend clarity.
A custom split shaped around your own payday rules.
This version of My Share is no longer supported. Please update to continue using your plan.
